title: SHERIFF'S OFFICE - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE SHERIFF'S OFFICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides law enforcement services that include search and rescue operations, criminal investigations, public records requests, and firearm licensing. Also provides animal-based services including animal control, cat and dog licensing, and shelter information. 309 State Street Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week - (541) 386-2711 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Non-Emergency Dispatch (541) 386-2711 Main phone (541) 386-2098 Animal Control (541) 387-7037 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, walk in, or visit website for more information. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Control Animal Licenses Sheriff Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
